final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU".

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (Eastern aesthetics) with minimalist, natural-poetic, warm-healing direction — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space with shallow depth of field — exact framing tightness is yours
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand wordmark and natural elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with golden-hour lighting — exact location and season details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs warm, golden-hour ("金色时光") atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) — exact ratios and additional tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs warm, natural surface treatment — exact grain and material weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve the brand's poetic, serene, warm-healing visual identity; generous negative space required
Avoid:
